---
title: "degree_vector"
generated: true
description: "Per-node degree (row sum) of an adjacency operator."
---

[‚Äπ back to `nitrix.graph.laplacian`](../nitrix-graph-laplacian.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:degree_vector -->
```python
degree_vector(A: _GraphInput) -> Num[Array, '... n']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:degree_vector -->
Per-node degree (row sum) of an adjacency operator.

For an [`ELL`](../nitrix-sparse.qmd) adjacency this is the sum of the
stored values along the last axis (pad positions contribute the
additive identity `0`).  For [`SectionedELL`](../nitrix-sparse.qmd),
each bucket is summed and scattered back to the original row order.
For dense `A` it is the row sum `A.sum(-1)`.

For directed graphs (asymmetric `A`) this returns the out-degree;
the corresponding in-degree is given by [`in_degree_vector`](../nitrix-graph-laplacian/in_degree_vector.qmd).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:degree_vector -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `A` | `_GraphInput` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | Adjacency operator: dense `(..., n, n)`, [`ELL`](../nitrix-sparse.qmd), or [`SectionedELL`](../nitrix-sparse.qmd). |

**Returns** `Num` ‚Äî shape `...` √ó `n`. Per-node (out-)degree, shape `(..., n)`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:degree_vector -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks ‚Äî nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **97.7 ¬µs** (median, L4).  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_DEGREE_VECTOR.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| degree_vector | jax-cpu | n=128 | `cupy.degree` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| degree_vector | jax-cpu | n=128 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 11.7 ¬µs / 12.3 ¬µs | 69.43 ms | 702 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00011√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| degree_vector | jax-cpu | n=128 | `numpy.degree` | ok | 6.6 ¬µs / 6.6 ¬µs | 17.7 ¬µs | 702 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00011√ótol | 0.56x vs nitrix-jax |
| degree_vector | jax-cuda12 | n=128 | `cupy.degree` | ok | 16.9 ¬µs / 18.5 ¬µs | 21.53 ms | 0.07 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00012√ótol | 0.18x vs nitrix-jax |
| degree_vector | jax-cuda12 | n=128 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 95.8 ¬µs / 97.7 ¬µs | 224.73 ms | 33.62 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00011√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| degree_vector | jax-cuda12 | n=128 | `numpy.degree` | ok | 8.0 ¬µs / 8.4 ¬µs | 20.7 ¬µs | 0.07 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00011√ótol | 0.08x vs nitrix-jax |
| degree_vector | jax-cpu | n=256 | `cupy.degree` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| degree_vector | jax-cpu | n=256 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 12.5 ¬µs / 17.0 ¬µs | 39.31 ms | 702 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00011√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| degree_vector | jax-cpu | n=256 | `numpy.degree` | ok | 17.0 ¬µs / 17.3 ¬µs | 27.1 ¬µs | 702 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00011√ótol | 1.35x vs nitrix-jax |
| degree_vector | jax-cuda12 | n=256 | `cupy.degree` | ok | 16.2 ¬µs / 17.9 ¬µs | 21.74 ms | 0.26 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00013√ótol | 0.18x vs nitrix-jax |
| degree_vector | jax-cuda12 | n=256 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 91.2 ¬µs / 95.4 ¬µs | 192.95 ms | 33.82 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00013√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| degree_vector | jax-cuda12 | n=256 | `numpy.degree` | ok | 21.8 ¬µs / 26.8 ¬µs | 37.5 ¬µs | 0.26 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00011√ótol | 0.24x vs nitrix-jax |
| degree_vector | jax-cpu | n=512 | `cupy.degree` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| degree_vector | jax-cpu | n=512 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 41.6 ¬µs / 45.0 ¬µs | 37.52 ms | 702 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00012√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| degree_vector | jax-cpu | n=512 | `numpy.degree` | ok | 56.4 ¬µs / 57.1 ¬µs | 67.5 ¬µs | 702 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00013√ótol | 1.36x vs nitrix-jax |
| degree_vector | jax-cuda12 | n=512 | `cupy.degree` | ok | 17.2 ¬µs / 19.3 ¬µs | 21.52 ms | 1.05 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00014√ótol | 0.19x vs nitrix-jax |
| degree_vector | jax-cuda12 | n=512 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 91.2 ¬µs / 95.5 ¬µs | 190.87 ms | 34.61 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00012√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| degree_vector | jax-cuda12 | n=512 | `numpy.degree` | ok | 56.8 ¬µs / 57.4 ¬µs | 77.1 ¬µs | 1.05 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00013√ótol | 0.62x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `f174a26b` ¬∑ nitrix `88a23053`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:degree_vector -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
